source.usage: Structured facts only (numbers, names, ranges, link targets). No prose, descriptions, or summaries are extracted or stored.

politeness.user_agent: dead-reckoning/0.1 (One Piece fan atlas; contact: shawn@leadalchemy.co)

islands.json.note_on_missing_chapters: 123 'islands' debut only in non-canon media (movies, games, ONAs, magazines, stage shows) and 33 are anime-only. They have no chapter because they are not in the manga — this is correct, not missing data. Filter on canon_status == 'manga' for the fog-able set.

notes: MACHINE-OWNED output. Safe to overwrite. Never hand-edit.
This script never writes to canon/ (asserted at runtime).
No crew join data is produced here. Crew joins are hand-authored: the wiki's 'Debut' field is NOT the join chapter (Jinbe debuts ~ep430, joins ~ep977).
